refreshRate.label: Measured
refreshRate.source: named-hardware physical-browser performance capture; idle-rAF median interval

browserMainThreadReserve.label: Measured
browserMainThreadReserve.source: named-hardware physical-browser performance capture; idle-rAF p95 minus p50

compositorGpuReserve.reason: The browser surface exposes no compositor timing API; no value is inferred.

deadlineInterval.label: Gated
deadlineInterval.source: 1.5 times the authored 16.67 ms current-adapter frame target

deadlineMissRatioGate.label: Gated
deadlineMissRatioGate.source: authored target applied to measured presentation cadence
